hero.trustBar: Partner to incubators, consulting firms and training centers in Cameroon
hero.title: Double the efficiency and profitability of your training with our e-learning solution
hero.subtitle: ThinkTech Solutions designs and deploys Moodle-based platforms built to be smooth and secure. Give your learners an intuitive experience on every device, so they can train without limits, anywhere and fully on their own.
hero.heroImageAlt: Learner using a training platform on a smartphone
hero.platformsTitle: Platforms we have designed and deployed

platforms.name: Bouka Creativ' Learning
platforms.description: In partnership with the Boukarou incubator, we designed this platform to support the upskilling of 42,000 young people across Cameroon's 10 regions, fostering digital inclusion and access to quality training.

platforms.name: Training To Rise
platforms.description: In collaboration with the audit and consulting firm MAXIMMACS, we deployed an LMS dedicated to certified training. This solution structures and digitizes learning in strategic fields such as management, tax, audit, accounting and artificial intelligence.

platforms.name: Erfolg Zentrum Online
platforms.description: We designed and launched this platform for a training center based in Germany. Fully operational, it offers a smooth, intuitive learning experience, ready to welcome learners from their very first login.

about.title: Who we are
about.intro: Founded in 2024 in Douala, ThinkTech Solutions was born from a simple conviction: training quality is one of the most powerful levers to build a better nation. Our team of 5 experts now supports universities, companies, NGOs and training centers across Cameroon in building high-performing, secure online learning platforms adapted to African realities.
about.intro2: Led by Ignace MBOM ELOUGA, CEO and founder, ThinkTech Solutions puts accessibility and human support at the heart of every project.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Make training accessible to everyone, everywhere.

visionMid.title: Mid-term vision
visionMid.text: Help young Africans embrace digital learning.

visionLong.title: Long-term vision
visionLong.text: Train a generation skilled and equipped for today's challenges.

values.title: Innovation
values.text: We constantly explore new ways to make training more engaging and effective.

values.title: Closeness
values.text: We stay attentive to each organization, with human support at every step.

values.title: Security
values.text: Your data and your learners' data are protected to the highest standards.

values.title: Excellence
values.text: We aim for quality in every deployment, every line of code, every interaction.

services.title: Our Moodle expertise, at your service
services.subtitle: From design to daily support, we handle the entire lifecycle of your training platform.

cards.title: Moodle platform deployment
cards.benefit: An operational platform quickly, configured to your needs.

cards.title: Visual and functional customization
cards.benefit: A platform that reflects your brand.

cards.title: Third-party system integration
cards.benefit: A platform connected to your existing tools.

cards.title: Admin and trainer training
cards.benefit: A self-sufficient team in the long run.

why.title: African context expertise
why.text: We design every platform with local realities in mind.

why.title: Low data consumption
why.text: Lightweight, fast platforms, even on limited connections.

why.title: Enhanced security
why.text: Protection of data, access and content.

why.title: End-to-end support
why.text: From needs analysis to daily support.

process.title: Needs analysis
process.text: We discuss your goals and constraints with you.

process.title: Deployment
process.text: We configure and launch your platform.

process.title: Training
process.text: We train your administrators and trainers.

process.title: Ongoing support
process.text: We stay available for support and updates.

contact.title: Ready to transform your training?
contact.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. In under 30 minutes, we'll show you how a well-designed Moodle platform can simplify your training management with no commitment.

form.name: Full name
form.needPlaceholder: Describe your project: estimated number of learners, type of training, desired timeline...
form.success: ✅ Thank you! Your request has been received. Our team will contact you within 24-48 business hours. Meanwhile, check our FAQ or email us at contact@thinktech-solutions.com.
form.error: An error occurred while sending. Please try again or email us directly at contact@thinktech-solutions.com.

items.q: How long does it take to deploy a Moodle platform?
items.a: Depending on project complexity, a platform can be operational within 2 to 6 weeks.

items.q: Does the platform work on smartphones?
items.a: Yes, all our platforms are mobile-first, with low data consumption.
Yes, we can connect your platform to existing tools (payment, HR, video conferencing...).

items.q: Do you offer maintenance and support?
items.a: Yes, we support every client after launch with responsive technical support.
Yes: protected hosting, HTTPS, regular backups and strict access management.

footer.tagline: Committed to educational excellence in Africa, we design and deploy online training platforms tailored to real needs on the ground.
